name: Blood Steve
description:
A horrifying corrupted version of Steve roams your world. With 666 HP and a darkness effect on every hit, Blood Steve will hunt you relentlessly across 128
  blocks. He never loses your trail.
author: GameHunter

name: Zombie Apocalypse
description:
Swarms of fast poisonous zombies with a 128-block detection range. These smaller, deadlier undead will surround you from every direction. Survival is not
  guaranteed.
author: GameHunter

name: Creepypasta Shader
description:
Transform your world into a dark horror scene. Eerie lighting, deep shadows and suffocating fog that makes every corner feel dangerous. Requires RenderDragon
  (Android 2019+).
author: Zephyr Craft

name: Hospital's Echo
description:
Explore an abandoned horror hospital filled with dark secrets. Navigate through haunted corridors, uncover the mystery and survive the echo of its past. Not
  for the faint-hearted.
author: Vojin2005
